new_text: CORRECTION (Session 24): Incorrectly claimed features unique to claude-mem that we have: observation capture (auto-capture + search/get ops), citation system (memory returns IDs), bug report generator (/audit, /status). Genuinely unique to claude-mem: Web UI (localhost:37777), persistent worker service (HTTP API), <private> tag exclusion, polished auto-install. Both have FTS5. Claude Code plugin = packaging format.

Domain Mastery System fully implemented. Dir: ~/.claude/domains/<name>/ with behavior.md, knowledge.md, profile.json. Core: hooks/shared/domain_registry.py (~270 lines). Skill: skills/domain/SKILL.md with list/activate/deactivate/create/graduate/refresh/status. Integration: orchestrator auto-detects, injects domain tags; enforcer applies domain gate modes; statusline shows DOM:name; subagent_context injects domain snippet; state.py has active_domain. Bootstrap: framework/ domain. Tests: 1422 pass, 2 fail (pre-existing).

Created hooks/shared/config_validator.py — framework config validator. API: validate_settings(path) validates settings.json (hook files exist, statusLine valid); validate_live_state(path) validates LIVE_STATE.json (10 required fields); validate_agent(path) validates agents/*.md frontmatter; validate_skill(path) validates skills/*/SKILL.md (## Commands, Flow, Steps, Phase, Loop sections); validate_all(base_dir) validates all; is_valid(path_or_result) convenience. Design: pure Python, no PyYAML, hand-rolled frontmatter parser, fnmatch skill patterns. LIVE_STATE fields: session_count, status, project, feature, feature_status, what_was_done, service_status, next_steps, known_issues.

Extension pack system implemented for Torus. Files: hooks/shared/extension_loader.py, hooks/tests/test_extension_loader.py. Design: load_extensions(ext_dir) scans ~/.claude/extensions/*/pack.json, fail-open (bad packs skip), idempotent (_extensions_loaded guard). validate_pack checks pack.json exists, valid JSON, required fields (name, gates), gate files exist, has check() (via ast.parse). Collision detection vs GATE_MODULES. sys.path patched per pack. gate_tool_map converted list→set. get_loaded_packs() returns copy. Tests: 16 passed. Note: Pre-existing PostToolUse hook error unrelated to work.

Session 97 wrap-up: ChromaDB Backup + DB Size Watchdog system (5 files modified). memory_server.py: _backup_database() with sqlite3.backup() API + "backup" UDS dispatch, fixed connection resource leak (init None, close in except). chromadb_socket.py: backup() client wrapper. gather.py: gather_backup() in wrap-up JSON. session_end.py: backup_database() with mtime-skip, called before increment. boot.py: watchdog two-tier: <1KB=truncation, <80% backup=shrinkage. Deep audit found 1 critical (connection leak—FIXED), 2 medium (TOCTOU mtime, no backup locking—acceptable), 2 low. 1043 tests pass.

Session 86 (2026-02-16)—MAJOR MCP consolidation: 15→7 active tools. Removed: deep_query, memory_stats (→maintenance health), dormant: get_recent_activity, get_session_sentiment, search_by_tags (→search_knowledge tags mode), search_observations, get_observation, timeline. NEW: Gate 15 (Causal Chain)—blocks edits after test failure until query_fix_history called. Built gate+tracker+bridge+State v3, +16 tests. CLAUDE.md causal chain edits (+52 tokens). Results: -21% tokens/prompt (~3821→3023), -159K tokens/session (200 calls), zero capabilities lost, consistency 0%→enforced causal chain, +1 gate, +16 tests, 4x defense depth.

v2.3.9 sprint completed (commit 03fd459). 3 features, 12 tests (831 total, 0 failures). 1) Secrets filter: 4 new patterns (SSH public keys, Slack tokens, Anthropic API keys, sk- 40+ char keys), now 12 patterns. WARN: Env var pattern #11 clobbers specific tokens—use neutral prefixes in tests. 2) Session end metrics: session_summary() loads recent state_*.json, extracts reads/edits/errors/verified/pending, prints compact stderr line. increment_session_count() accepts metrics param, stores in LIVE_STATE.json. 3) Subagent skill context: _format_skill_usage() reads recent_skills, deduplicates, shows last 5. Test fix: removed env var key prefixes to avoid clobber.

USAGE_GUIDE.md accuracy edits (Session 243+, 2026-02-26). Updates: v2.6→v2.5.3, "20-step"→"~20-step", ChromaDB→LanceDB throughout, L1 section renamed, entry count 1341→1488, path ~/data/memory/lancedb/, access via MCP+optimistic concurrency, Collections→Tables, memory_server.py 4188→4303 lines, analytics_server.py 379→425 lines, telegram_search→transcript_context, .chromadb.sock→"Memory UDS (legacy name)", skills 34→33, test_framework 12,264 lines, shared/ 49 modules ~20357 lines. Session End: backs up ChromaDB→updates LIVE_STATE.

Created hooks/shared/auto_remediate.py—auto-remediation engine. API: get_remediation(gate_name, context)→{strategy, action, auto_apply, message}; apply_remediation(remediation)→bool; remediation_stats()→dict; register_custom_remediation(gate_name, strategy). Strategies (all auto_apply=False): Gate 1 (READ BEFORE EDIT) suggest Read; Gate 4 (MEMORY FIRST) suggest search_knowledge; Gate 5 (PROOF) suggest test_framework.py; Gate 11 (RATE LIMIT) calculate wait secs; Gate 15 (CAUSAL CHAIN) suggest query_fix_history. Constants: GATE_1-15 match strings. Stats file: ~/.claude/hooks/.remediation_stats.json (atomic). AUTO-APPLY: only touch-memory-sideband mapped. Tests: 43/43 pass, AST OK.

test_framework.py ChromaDB→LanceDB migration COMPLETE. ALL 13 updates: Line 1343 (requires), 1424 (style), 1518/1523 (init), 1529-1536 (×8), 3496-97 (segfault), 3690 (uses), 4937 (concurrent), 5341/5379/6623 (needed), 7178 (integration), 8339 (side effects). KEPT AS-IS: chromadb_socket import, socket client tests comment, ChromaDB test inputs, function names.

ChromaDB→LanceDB comment updates in test_framework.py: Lines 1343 (requires), 1424 (style), 1518/1523 (init), 1529-1536 (×8 test names), 3496-97 (segfault/concurrent), 3690 (uses), 4937 (concurrent), 5341/5379/6623 (needed), 7178 (integration), 8339 (side effects). KEPT: chromadb_socket.py module names, socket paths, test inputs, function names.

Created hooks/shared/retry_strategy.py—configurable retry strategies. API: Strategy enum (EXPONENTIAL_BACKOFF, LINEAR_BACKOFF, CONSTANT, FIBONACCI), Jitter enum (NONE, FULL, EQUAL, DECORRELATED), RetryConfig dataclass, should_retry(operation, error, config)→bool, get_delay(operation, config)→float (no sleeping), record_attempt(operation, success, error, config), reset(operation), get_stats(operation)→dict, with_retry(func_or_operation) context manager/decorator. Design: fail-open, module _registry, fibonacci memoised, pure delay computation. Tests: 25/25 smoke pass.

TRv1 comprehensive unit tests COMPLETE. 1) developer_fees.rs 8 tests: below_min_compute_units, two_programs_proportional, full_happy_path, inactive_undeliverable, cooldown_undeliverable, mixed. Fix: AccountSharedData::new + set_data_from_slice, ProgramRevenueConfigForTest BorshSerialize. 2) constants.rs 15 tests: all 6 tiers for reward_rate, vote_weight, early_unlock_penalty, is_valid_tier. 3) state.rs 6 tests: round-trip, discriminator, wrong_discriminator, empty, buffer_size, permanent_lock. Fix: added features=[borsh] to solana-pubkey. 4) fee_distribution.rs 1 test: u16 bps (NOT f64). Workspace members treasury/developer-rewards commented to build.

Security audit of session_end.py backup integration. Findings: MEDIUM (M-1) TOCTOU race in backup_database() lines 334-335—getmtime twice creates window. Mitigation: store mtimes before comparison. LOW: L-1 import alias OK, L-2 MEMORY_DIR consistent, L-3 first-run edge case handled (exists check + fail-open), L-4 worker death fail-open (atomic .tmp+replace). ADVISORY (A-1) lifecycle correct (backup after flush, before increment). Overall: mostly correct with fail-open. Main risk: TOCTOU race (theoretical, low exploitability single-user CLI).

SESSION 211 COMPARISON: Memory Server vs Enforcer Daemon UDS Resilience. ENFORCER (watchdog): _bind_socket helper, while True accept loop, PROACTIVE watchdog checks os.path.exists every ~1s, rebinds if missing, _shutting_down flag prevents rebind on shutdown. MEMORY SERVER (no watchdog): inlined bind, same accept loop, NO watchdog—socket.timeout just continues, never detects external deletion, reactive rebind on OSError. KEY: Memory server LACKS proactive watchdog. External socket deletion undetected until ~100 requests or OSError (~1s max enforcer latency).
